summary: Comprehensive testing of StudyBrain MVP - AI tutor with persistent hindsight memory. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend flows working correctly. Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration via emergentintegrations is functional.

issues: Topic title shows 'Loading...' briefly before actual title loads - minor UX issue

seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest run with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Health check, Auth (register/login/logout/me), Topics CRUD, Chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5, Memory extraction, Quiz generation and answering, Dashboard stats, Authorization (user isolation). Frontend flows: Landing page, Signup, Login, Dashboard, Topic creation modal, Topic page with chat and memory sidebar, Quiz flow, Logout, ProtectedRoute redirect.

backend.auth_register: POST /api/auth/register creates user, returns JWT+user - PASS
backend.auth_login: POST /api/auth/login with credentials returns JWT - PASS
backend.auth_me: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user - PASS
backend.auth_wrong_password: Login with wrong password returns 401 - PASS
backend.chat: POST /api/topics/{id}/chat returns user_message, assistant_message, memory - PASS (Claude Sonnet 4.5 working)
backend.memory: GET /api/topics/{id}/memory returns hindsight memory object - PASS
backend.quiz_answer: POST /api/quiz/answer returns correct, correct_index, explanation - PASS
backend.dashboard: GET /api/dashboard returns total_topics, total_messages, avg_mastery, weak_spots, topics - PASS
backend.authorization: User B cannot access User A's topics (returns 404) - PASS

frontend.landing_page: Landing page loads at / with hero, nav, CTA - PASS
frontend.signup: Signup page /signup creates account and routes to /dashboard - PASS
frontend.login: Login page /login authenticates and routes to /dashboard - PASS
frontend.dashboard: Dashboard shows stats row (topics/messages/mastery) and empty state - PASS
frontend.new_topic_modal: 'New Topic' modal creates topic with title+level, navigates to /topic/:id - PASS
frontend.topic_page: Topic page loads, shows chat area + memory sidebar - PASS
frontend.chat_flow: Sending a message shows tutor response and updates memory panel (concepts appear) - PASS
frontend.quiz_flow: 'Quiz me' navigates to /quiz/:topicId. Generates 5 MCQs. Selecting+Submitting shows feedback - PASS
frontend.logout: Logout clears session and returns to login - PASS
